title: REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH CARE - 211info
text: LA CLINICA BIRCH GROVE HEALTH CENTER REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH CARE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF A statewide network of certified health care providers that ensure access to a variety of reproductive health services. Services include annual gynecological exams, pap tests, breast exams, STI screening and treatment. Offers pregnancy testing, birth control counseling, contraception, emergency contraception and abortions. 910 S Central Avenue Medford, OR 97501 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Varies by site Email (541) 618-1300 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Medical Appointments (541) 618-1300 Main phone (541) 618-1380 Care Team Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information and to schedule an appointment FEES: Accepts OHP, Medicare, and most private insurances. Sliding scale fees based on income and family size for patients with no health insurance. Will refer qualifying people to the Women’s Health Center for free and low-cost options from the Oregon Reproductive Health state program. LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Jackson and Josephine Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Thursday 8am-6pm, Friday 8am-5pm Services: Abortion Referrals Birth Control Counseling Breast Examinations Contraception Emergency Contraception General Sexuality/Reproductive Health Education Pap Tests Pregnancy Testing Sexually Transmitted Infection Screening Other Services Offered At This Location: GENERAL MEDICAL CARE - GENERAL MEDICAL CARE HEALTH SCREENING/DIAGNOSTIC SERVICES - SCREENWISE-ENROLLING MENTAL HEALTH CARE FACILITIES - BEHAVIORAL HEALTH If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. LA CLINICA BIRCH GROVE HEALTH CENTER
